prompt: Create a smart home dashboard using the home map style from the first image and device control widgets from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a smart home dashboard interface. The main display should feature a detailed, top-down 3D floor plan of a house, replicating the visual style, room layouts, and the representation of smart devices with white circular icons as seen in image 1. To the right of this floor plan, arrange a vertical stack of interactive device control widgets. Each widget should precisely replicate the dark-themed, rectangular card design with rounded corners from image 2, including the specific device icon, its name (e.g., 'Fan', 'AC'), current 'On' or 'Off' status, and a distinctly colored toggle switch (blue for off, orange for on), consistent with the examples provided in image 2.
objects: detailed, top-down 3D floor plan of a house
room layouts (e.g., Media room, Living room, Kitchen) from image 1
smart devices represented by white circular icons on the floor plan
vertical stack of interactive device control widgets (to the right of the floor plan)
dark-themed, rectangular widget cards with rounded corners
device icons within widgets (e.g., fan, AC, light bulb)
distinctly colored toggle switches within widgets (blue for off, orange for on)
